---
title: "Notebook: Combining Statistical and Systematic Errors"
lang: en
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
  pdf:
    pdf-engine: lualatex
jupyter: python3
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

The simplest placeholder for the systematics chapter.

## Error summary

```{python}
import math
import pandas as pd

value = 12.4
stat = 0.8
syst = 0.5
total = math.sqrt(stat**2 + syst**2)

pd.DataFrame({
    "component": ["central value", "stat", "syst", "total"],
    "value": [value, stat, syst, total],
})
```
